stories.title: OpenAI available at FedRAMP Moderate
stories.summary: OpenAI is available at FedRAMP Moderate authorization for ChatGPT Enterprise and the OpenAI API, enabling secure AI adoption for U.S. federal agencies.

stories.title: This Roboticist-Turned-Teacher Built a Life-Size Replica of ENIAC
stories.summary: Tom Burick has always considered himself a builder. Over the years he’s designed robots, constructed a vintage teardrop trailer , and most recently, led a group of students in building a full-scale replica of a pivotal 1940s computer. Burick is a technology instructor at PS Academy in Gilbert, Ariz.

stories.title: SquareMind raises $18M for robotic dermatology platform
stories.summary: Squaremind has raised funding to launch Swan, a robotic platform that automates full-body skin imaging for early cancer detection. The post SquareMind raises $18M for robotic dermatology platform appeared first on The Robot Report .

stories.title: Learn about the latest advances in physical AI at the Robotics Summit
stories.summary: The Robotics Summit & Expo will have an entire track of sessions focusing on how to apply artificial intelligence to robotics. The post Learn about the latest advances in physical AI at the Robotics Summit appeared first on The Robot Report .

stories.title: Elon Musk and Sam Altman are going to court over OpenAI’s future
stories.summary: After a yearslong legal feud, Elon Musk and OpenAI CEO Sam Altman are heading to trial this week in Northern California in a case that could have sweeping consequences. stories.title: Claude Code costs up to $200 a month. Goose does the same thing for free.

stories.title: AGI Is Not Multimodal
